description: remove the scoped staging artifacts for a model (build/.venv_<name>, models/<name>/hf_model, models/<name>/onnx_export) after ONNX export — preserving the shared venv (destructive)
rules: MODEL_NAME is regex-validated (^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$) and '.'/'..' are rejected explicitly to prevent escaping the target dirs
Only candidate paths that resolve under ./build/ or ./models/ of the working root are removed — anything outside is skipped
Set CLEANUP_DRY_RUN=1 to preview the removals (the impl prints [dry-run] rm -rf ...) without deleting anything
Never removes the shared build/.venv_optimum — only the per-model build/.venv_<name>
usage: Set MODEL_NAME. The porter scopes the working root to ${RECORD_STORE}/workspace by default (override with CLEANUP_ROOT). Set CLEANUP_DRY_RUN=1 to preview. Output: cleanup-staging.json (audit manifest with removed/planned counts).
limitation: Destructive: real runs delete the per-model staging dirs under the working root. It only ever touches build/ and models/ subpaths matching MODEL_NAME; it cannot remove arbitrary paths.
